settings.title: Partner with Maximum Effort
settings.text:
Elevate your school or club athletics program with our specialist coaching services. We provide professional support for:

  • School Sport Programs: Curriculum-aligned athletics coaching for primary and secondary students.
  • Club Workshops: Specialist clinics for sprints, jumps, and strength conditioning.
  • Coach Mentoring: Professional development for your PE staff or club volunteers.
  • Elite Athlete: Reach out and let's collaborate.

Fully insured and compliant with all Working With Children requirements.
